The Best of Me (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,766,213Details
International Box Office $14,293,205
Worldwide Box Office $41,059,418
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,435,537
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,305,224
Total $14,740,761
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Dawson and Amanda are two former high school sweethearts who find themselves reunited after 20 years apart, when they return to their small town for the funeral of a beloved friend. Their bittersweet reunion reignites the love they’ve never forgotten, but soon they discover the forces that drove them apart twenty years ago live on, posing even more serious threats today. Spanning decades, this love story captures the enduring power of our first true love, and the wrenching choices we face when confronted with elusive second chances.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,003,827 (37.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.68 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:65.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,936 opening theaters/2,936 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $39,180,027

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 17th, 2014 (Wide) by Relativity
International Releases: October 31st, 2014 (Wide), released as The Best Of Me (Australia)
January 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Germany)
May 1st, 2015 (Wide) (Spain)
June 18th, 2015 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: February 3rd, 2015 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexuality, violence, some drug content and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2341, 9/24/2014)
PG-13 for sexuality, violence, some drug content and brief strong language.

Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Dawson and Amanda are two former high school sweethearts who find themselves reunited after 20 years apart, when they return to their small town for the funeral of a beloved friend. Their bittersweet reunion reignites the love they’ve never forgotten, but soon they discover the forces that drove them apart twenty years ago live on, posing even more serious threats today. Spanning decades, this love story captures the enduring power of our first true love, and the wrenching choices we face when confronted with elusive second chances.
